channel.title: IOT on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in IOT on Frank Huang

item.title: What is BacNet protocol
item.description: BacNet protocol stands for building automation control network. Why(aka where) do we need it? Traditionally, different devices have their own way talking to each other. In order to let different devices to communicate with each other, a standard protocol is required which is why BacNet comes into play. How to use that? Different kind of server that I have encountered nginx, tomcat, bacnet Different componet requirements
